name: your-team-brain
description: Shared Claude context layer for teams and individuals: shared memory, perspectives, and session rituals distributed as one plugin.

plugins.name: brain
plugins.description: The brain: setup, sync, push/share, session rituals (handoff/log/reflect/wrap), and clean disconnect. Skills and commands are declared explicitly (./skills, ./commands) so the executable surface is unambiguous. source is '.' because the manifest lives at the repo root; the memory dirs (shared-memory/, perspectives/, project-memory/) that get copied into the plugin cache alongside the skills are INERT there and must never be @import'd from the cache, context is always imported from the git clone. Version is intentionally omitted so every commit counts as a newer version; setup-brain enables autoUpdate on this marketplace so those commits (new skills included) actually install at session start. Version omission defines 'newer'; autoUpdate applies it.
